name: Yuuya Mochizuki
description: Mochizuki is a student at Yomiyama North Middle School, 9th Grade Class 3. He is a member of the art club.

name: Zange Natsume
description: **Height:** 179 cm Just like the others, Natsume is a half youkai (demon) and half human. He is the pair of Banri. He has a cheerful personality and usually wears Bunny ears. He is particularly fond of Soushi and tenderly calls him "Sou-tan". Zange has red hair. Under his bandage on his forehead, he has a third eye which he uncovers in his youkai form. name: Aki Mizuguchi
description: Aki is a third year high school student and the bassist for the SS Girls. She is best friends with Yori and was one of the first people to encourage her to pursue Himari. ~!Yori and Aki are best friends. Aki sometime after they became friends fell in love with her, having wanted several times to take an "extra step" but decided to not confess her feelings and only stay by her side as a friend in fear of losing their current relationship.!~

name: Akihiro Hirata
description: Height: 178 cm (5'10) Akihiro Hirata is a 3rd-year science and engineering student at Kansei University. Hirata is resident of room 104 at Chikuseiso. Nico is the tallest among the Aotake runners with a muscular statue. He also has a light beard and chin-length brown hair, which he wears in a low ponytail. He is often seen in sweats. name: Anne Faulkner
description: __Height:__ 175 cm Their appearance takes that of a fashionable modern girl, but in reality, they are the manliest one in BAE. In their younger years, they were oppressed by their old-fashioned and strict mother. Because of that, they decided to live true to themselves. Right now, they are working part-time as a hostess, taking advantage of their good looks.

name: Aries
description: Aries is a timid female, very softspoken and shy. In the past, [Karen](https://anilist.co/character/33525) the Celestial Spirit mage forced her to do many horrible things and generally abused her, such as using her as a shield (Because, apparently, she has no fighting abilities) and using her to lead away all of her boyfriends instead of simply refusing them. Because when she fully matures, her body will require a regular supply of semen to keep from wasting away, much like a vampire requires blood. Unfortunately, her mother's extreme excesses have led her to develop a fierce hatred and disgust toward all men. Astarotte demands that the first member of her harem be a human from the human world. name: Bu Lü
description: Courtesy name Fengxian. Lü Bu started in the series as a prominent general under the service of Dong Zhuo. Ambitious and treacherous he is willing to do anything for power and even betrays his foster father for power. Known for his physical prowess he is often called "God of war" and is often hailed as the strongest character in the series. He is however not only strong but also cunning as he manages to plan devious schemes to raise him higher in the ranks.

name: Carrot
description: Carrot is one of the characters in the Peach Boy Riverside series. She is a High Oni who was previously known as Meki that joins Sally on her travels after losing her powers. She is an Oni from the east.

name: Chachamaru Ashikaga
description: One of the four generals who serves on Rokuhara under command of Ashikaga Moriuji. She has her own plans for Kageaki.

name: Dizzy
description: __Race: __ Command-Type Half-Gear __Relatives: __ Justice (Mother), [Frederick Bulsara](https://anilist.co/character/30931/Sol-Badguy) (Father), [Ky Kiske](https://anilist.co/character/30932/Ky-Kiske) (Husband), [Sin Kiske](https://anilist.co/character/72989/Sin-Kiske) (Son). __Weapons:__ Necro and Undine (Shapeshifting Wings) Dizzy is the daughter of Justice, growing up unaware of her origins. name: Elsa Dorothy
description: **Height:** 158cm **Good at:** Anything related to magic. **Bad at:** Physical activity. The heroine of the otome game that Yvonne was reincarnated into.

name: Francesca Lucchini
nativeName: フランチェスカ・ルッキーニ
description: **Height:** 148 cm Joining the 501st from the Duchy of Romagna, Francesca is the youngest soldier of the unit at a mere twelve years. Her rank is that of a Warrant officer and her unit affiliation was with Romagna's Regia Aeronautica 4th Air Unit. Francesca is often childish and self-indulgent, shirking training and other duties in order to have fun around the base or nap. However, in battle she displays a true talent and passion for flying. Also displayed are the ears and tail of a black leopar

name: Futoshi
description: Pilots the Franxx Genista (ジェニスタ) with Kokoro (ココロ)

name: Haegolbyeongsa
description: He is a skeleton who has the ability to return to a specific point in time every time he dies. Skeleton was just a regular Skeleton Soldier minion placed under the Demon Lord Baal. His past as a human remains unknown. His grave where his remains are buried had no clues about his past. The tombstone of his grave had been scratched so bad that they can't even see his name on it.

name: Hanabi Natsubayashi
description: Hanabi is a blunt and unsociable classmate of Fumiya Tomozaki. She has a close friendship with Mimimi who is her polar opposite. Her blunt nature often leaves her disliked. Once, it got her into trouble as she openly condemned Erika's actions of harassment and bullying, thus making her the target of bullying herself.

name: Hishida Shunsou
description: Shunsou was a famous artist but his art technique was criticized due to it being “different” from the standard at the time. He comes from quite a good family but is freeloading in Ougai’s house. Quiet and reserved, can be snarky and apathetic at first but is probably the only one who could stand Ougai’s antics. If his artist mode is switched on however.

description: A powerful mage in his past and current life, Ian has a mature mindset befitting his true age in the forties-fifties, as well as an inner ruthlessness concealed by his courteous behavior.

name: Kasumi Yashiro
description: __Height:__ 133 cm (4' 5") __Nationality:__ Russian __Affiliation:__ United Nations Army Kasumi is a mysterious girl living in Yokohama base under Professor Kouzuki's care, who is often spotted floor B-19 in the room with the cylinder containing a brain. She wears a different uniform with a patch that says "Alternative IV" on it. Kasumi is quiet and reserved, rarely speaking to others on her own or showing much emotion. name: Keimi
description: __Current job:__ Takoyaki store employee __Dream job:__ Designer A mermaid who appeared in the [Hatchan](https://anilist.co/character/4889)'s Sea-Floor Stroll mini-series. She first appears after being saved by Hatchan from inside the mouth of a big fish alongside her Starfish friend. name: Kigurumi Haroukitei
description: A girl with cream-colored hair who likes cats and often pretends to be cute in front of others. Her name is a pun on Hello Kitty and Kigurumi.

name: Kokone Takatsu
description: A type A7M3 production robot who works as a courier out of Yokohama. She is the first other robot that Alpha met when she delivered a package (containing a camera) and a message from Alpha's owner. They quickly become friends. Kokone is sweet, shy, and somewhat intellectual, but because of her job she has more experience with people than Alpha.
